added.2zdDw5: By clicking "{cta}", you’ll create a game server hosted by {provider}. The servers and all activity within them are powered by {provider} and subject to [{provider}’s Terms of Service]({termsOfServiceUrl}). Discord doesn’t monitor these servers. Visit our [Help Center]({helpCenterUrl}) for practical tips on engaging positively when using game servers.
added.6TgadG: Your plan changes to {planName} on {date, date, medium}.
added.7n6Qq+: By clicking confirm, your game server subscription will reactivate. You won’t be charged today — you’ll be charged {price} on {date}, and your billing cycle will continue as scheduled.
added.H9ti8H: Your game server is ready! Manage it anytime from ‘Game Servers’ tab in Shop.
added.MmcIbA: This downgrade takes effect at your next renewal.
added.QBFUMO: This upgrade is prorated and takes effect immediately.
